questions.a: Standard shipping typically takes 3-5 business days within the contiguous US. Expedited 2-day shipping is available at checkout.
We offer a 90-day Comfort Guarantee. If you are not completely satisfied with the relief provided by Aequum Orthos, you can return them for a full refund, even if they have been worn.
Currently, we ship to the US, Canada, UK, and Australia. International shipping times vary between 7-14 business days.

questions.q: How do I choose the right size?
questions.a: Our insoles correspond to standard shoe sizes. If you are a half size, we recommend sizing down (e.g., if you are an 8.5, choose size 8).

questions.q: Will they fit in any shoe?
questions.a: They are designed for shoes with removable factory insoles. This includes most athletic shoes, casual boots, and roomy dress shoes. They are not recommended for tight-fitting dress shoes or high heels.

questions.q: Can I trim them to fit?
questions.a: Yes. The top edge is marked with trim lines. Use your original shoe insole as a template and carefully trim with sharp scissors if needed.

questions.q: Are these only for flat feet?
questions.a: While specifically engineered for flat feet and low arches, individuals with neutral arches seeking enhanced sensory stimulation and pressure relief can also benefit.

questions.q: How long does it take to get used to them?
questions.a: The tactile nodes provide new sensory input. We recommend wearing them for 1-2 hours the first day, gradually increasing wear time over 5-7 days as your feet adapt.
Yes. Hand wash with mild soap and lukewarm water. Air dry completely before reinserting into shoes. Do not machine wash or dry.
